results.rendered_html:
aśrāddha a. Not performing the Śrāddha ceremony; not entitled to it, not belonging or relating to it.
— ddhaḥ Non-performance of a Śrāddha q. v.
Comp.
— bhojin a. one who has vowed not to eat during the performance of a Śrāddha ceremony.
